items.title: Pipeline Trust Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve activity trust, manager inspection quality, and forecast reliability.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve confidence in committed forecast calls.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve commercial visibility for expansion timing.

productBricks.change: Improve forecast rollups and quota views.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out updated manager review flows.
Deploy updated inspection and forecast services.

items.title: Revenue Flow Compression Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to reduce complex quote friction and smooth the contract-to-billing handoff.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve conversion of more complex commercial motions.

productBricks.change: Improve quote assembly and approval routing.
Improve billing handoff from approved contracts.

deliveryChannels.change: Deploy updated quote and billing services.

items.title: Digital Service and AI Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve self-service quality, AI action governance, and assisted fallback quality.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve assisted resolution quality after fallback.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out improved assisted fallback workflows.

items.title: Trusted Platform Activation Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve trusted profile readiness, automation publishing, and reusable integration patterns.

customerKPIs.kpi: Time to publish a governed automation
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce admin lead time for governed change.
Increase data and AI readiness in target accounts.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase account readiness for Data Cloud and Agentforce expansion.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out updated admin and governance tools.
Roll out updated integration control patterns.
